Stories Tagged "Water Myth"

A focused archive path for Water Myth, collecting 3 related Kyunolab records across 1 shelf.

Myths

The Firebird That Hid the First Ember

A strange archive note about a firebird hides the first ember beneath its wing so people must learn patience before warmth.

Myths - 9 min read
Myths

The River That Asked the Mountain for a Name

A strange archive note about a river asks a mountain for a name and carries the answer only during spring floods.

Myths - 10 min read
Myths

The River That Remembers the First Name: A Myth of Memory and Water

A river said to remember the first name spoken beside it.

Myths - 8 min read
